query: faded polaroid old photograph yellowed vintage snapshot
message: sub:analog_degradation/faded_polaroid — anti_aesthetic — sepia, yellowing, faded snapshots, browned old photos

response.objective_caption: Several men appear distributed across the frame with their faces and upper bodies visible. In the center, a man wearing glasses and a light-colored collared shirt with a horizontal stripe holds a small cylindrical object near his face. To the right, a man with a beard and glasses wears a shirt with visible lettering and smiles toward the camera. Another person appears in the lower left near a clear glass carafe.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A multiple exposure photograph layering translucent portraits of several men across a single frame, creating ghosted overlapping figures. Analog film grain textures the entire image, and a bright light leak washes over the left side. The color palette is muted and faded with a sickly greenish-yellow cast. In the center, a man wearing glasses and a light-colored collared shirt with a horizontal stripe holds a small cylindrical object near his face. To the right, a bearded man with glasses wears a shirt with visible lettering and smiles toward the camera. A clear glass carafe sits near the lower left.
